series_metadata.series_description: Civil Service Application, Computer/Network Access, Disability Separation Agreement, Drug Testing Acknowledgement, electronic or paper evaluations, Exit Checklist, Fraud Hotline Acknowledgement (HV66), Human Trafficking Acknowledgement, Letters/Correspondence (HR related), Licensure, Certifications, Military Leave forms, New Hire/Orientation/Policy Acknowledgements, OAKS ID form, Retirement forms, Outside Employment, Poll Workers forms, Position Descriptions (Employee file), Pre-Employment packet, Prior Service Form & Information, Promotion/HQ Change/Changes in Position Acknowledgement, Reference Checks, Resume/CV, Cover Letter, Security Access form, Separation/Acceptance letters, Statement Concerning Your Employment Not Covered by Social Security, Supplemental Employment Agreement, Supplemental Nepotism Statement (ADM 4173), Training/Education documents, Unclassified Services Explanation & Acknowledgement, Unemployment Compensation, electronic or paper Personnel Actions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If a paper version of a record exists, scan and retain the record electronically, then dispose of paper. ; Electronic: Retain 7 years from effective date of employee separation., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
